profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profile.selectCompany: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
profile.storedIn: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{company}}.
profile.clickAvatar: Click the avatar to upload a new image.
profile.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profile.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.
profile.uploadCompany: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.

instance.title: Instance Settings
instance.defaultLanguageHint: Default language for new users and users who haven't set a preference

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language. Changes apply immediately.

heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.disableConfirm: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled {{noun}}?
heartbeats.noHeartbeats: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
heartbeats.disableFailedMultiple: Failed to disable {{failures}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}

general.title: General
general.description: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
general.localTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
general.publicAuth: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
general.privateAuth: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
general.censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
general.keyboardShortcutsDescription: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
general.backupRetentionDescription: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
general.aiFeedbackDescription: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
general.feedbackNoDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
general.dontAllowDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
general.feedbackRetestHint: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
general.signOutDescription: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.enableEnvironmentsDescription: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
experimental.enableIsolatedWorkspacesDescription: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDevServerDescription: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
experimental.autoCreateRecoveryDescription: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.
experimental.lookbackInvalid: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.
experimental.noRecoveryTasks: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.
experimental.skippedOutsideLookback_one: {{count}} current finding is outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.
experimental.skippedOutsideLookback_other: {{count}} current findings are outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.

access.adminRequired: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
access.title: Instance Access
access.description: Search users, manage instance-admin status, and control which companies they can access.
access.selectUser: Select a user to inspect instance access.
access.companyAccessDescription: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.
